race.comment: CUMULATE (5) was plainer at Seymour after a strong debut showing at Echuca. Fitter now and ater scratchings will be tough to beat. SEXY WARRIOR (8) peaks and may control the race from an inside gate. Gets in well with the 3kg claim and seems to be managing soft ground. Is sure to give a sight. CALL ME RHONDA (4) resumes and has placed fresh. Will race over further but was in the finish in a recent Bendigo jumpout and should get through the ground. Ditto LYTTELTON (2), who resumes and has placed from and over this distance. Expect him to be running into it as well. MORNING UNCLE (3) also resumes and should be better than the rest.
